description.ko: 잊힌 세탁 기계들 속에서 고요한 디지털 봄 정원이 피어납니다.
description.en: A serene digital spring garden blooms from forgotten laundromat machines.

prompt: For 2026-04-20, FLORA-9 appears as a peaceful spring bloom inside a forgotten automated laundromat, where silent washing machines and glass dryer doors have become round nursery windows for digital nature. Emerald #50C878 moss cushions the enamel surfaces, fine roots lace through coin trays, detergent drawers, rubber door seals, and old control buttons, gently converting every appliance into a planter. Within each circular drum, fractal flowers rotate open like living mandalas: translucent digital petals in soft #FFB6C1 blush and #89CFF0 sky blue unfold in nested layers, traced with delicate green circuit-veins and dotted with dew-bright encoded seeds. Deep #4A0E4E plum shadows glow inside the dark machine interiors and beneath cracked tile flooring, balanced by pastel morning light entering through steamed front windows. High-density pollen-like particles drift slowly between hanging cables, softened chrome, and vine-wrapped pipes, making the laundromat feel calm, fertile, and permanently in bloom as nature quietly reclaims the obsolete machines.
